form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Clases_Organizativas.ESTRUCTURA.guia

qry:select.name: sql_root
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT C.oi_estructura_org, C.d_clase_org, C.l_automatica, SEC.policy
FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG as C, {%? ($PARAM/@empresa!='') {% ORG03_EMPRESAS as E, ORG01_UNI_ORG as U, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as S, %} {% %} %} NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Clases_Organizativas.CLASE_ORG\') as SEC
JOIN {%? ($PARAM/@empresa!='') {% E.oi_unidad_org inner U.oi_unidad_org, S.oi_unidad_org inner U.oi_unidad_org, C.oi_estructura_org inner S.oi_estructura, %} {% %} %} C.oi_clase_org LEFT OUTER SEC.id
WHERE C.c_estado = \'V\' {%? ($PARAM/@empresa!='') {% and E.oi_empresa={%=$PARAM/@empresa%} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura, ORG01_TIPOS_UNI.c_tipo_uni_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG, ORG01_TIPOS_UNI JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_tipo_uni_org INNER ORG01_TIPOS_UNI.oi_tipo_uni_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.l_automatica FROM ORG02_CLASES_HIJAS, ORG02_CLASES_ORG JOIN ORG02_CLASES_HIJAS.oi_clase_org INNER ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' AND ORG02_CLASES_HIJAS.oi_estructura = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_level_1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT C.oi_estructura_org as id, C.c_clase_org as cod, C.d_clase_org as des, SEC.policy
FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG AS C, {%? ($PARAM/@empresa!='') {% ORG03_EMPRESAS as E, ORG01_UNI_ORG as U, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as S, %} {% %} %} NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Clases_Organizativas.CLASE_ORG\') as SEC
JOIN {%? ($PARAM/@empresa!='') {% E.oi_unidad_org inner U.oi_unidad_org, S.oi_unidad_org inner U.oi_unidad_org, C.oi_estructura_org inner S.oi_estructura, %} {% %} %} C.oi_clase_org LEFT OUTER SEC.id
WHERE C.c_estado = \'V\' {%? ($PARAM/@empresa!='') {% and E.oi_empresa={%=$PARAM/@empresa%} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS

qry:select.name: sql_level_x
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EST.oi_estructura as id, UNI.c_unidad_org as cod, UNI.d_unidad_org as des FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as EST, ORG01_UNI_ORG as UNI JOIN UNI.oi_unidad_org INNER EST.oi_unidad_org WHERE EST.oi_estr_padre in ({%=$PARAM/@strOI %}) ')/ROWS

qry:select.name: sqlFID
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre as id FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_level_x
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EST.oi_estructura as id, UNI.c_unidad_org as cod, UNI.d_unidad_org as des FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as EST, ORG01_UNI_ORG as UNI JOIN UNI.oi_unidad_org INNER EST.oi_unidad_org WHERE EST.oi_estr_padre in ({%=$PARAM/@strOI %}) ')/ROWS
